"'''Masslines'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by the [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]]. The song appeared on the band's compilation album ''[[Limited Warfare]]'', a record that was in circulation in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="GG9" /> between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> Red Shift Limit was a notorious anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] band, which resulted in "Masslines" being banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Masslines" was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', the [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />
